name: Tabikobo Co. Ltd.
summary: Tabikobo Co. Ltd. engages in the travel business in Japan and internationally. The company provides various travel support services. It offers travel arrangements for corporations, such as overseas business trips, MICE, incentive travel, company, study, and group trips, as well as concert and event services. The company also provides online tour booking services. Tabikobo Co. Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
